top_signals.title: Americans are feeling inflation's pinch into the holiday weekend. Here's where prices are rising the most
top_signals.summary: Prices related to travel, recreation and food saw particularly steep increases, stretching Americans' wallets as they celebrate the unofficial start of summer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Japanese listed firms log record net profits in 2025
top_signals.summary: The figure for the year ended in March hit a record high for the fifth consecutive year, thanks to rosy earnings of semiconductor- and data center-related companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Blue dot fever’? What's really behind a tricky summer dynamic for live music
top_signals.summary: As prices rise everywhere, consumers are choosing to be more intentional with how they're spending on live music and concerts this year.
